error_signature: sending by application/json instead of multi-part/form-data
title: Incorrect content type for file upload to Xano
symptom: The file upload to Xano fails when the content type is set to application/json instead of multi-part/form-data.
not_this_if: File upload works with correct content type
root_cause: Xano requires file uploads to be sent as multi-part/form-data to properly handle file resources. Using application/json does not provide the necessary format for file data, leading to upload failures.
fix_steps: Change the content type of the request to multi-part/form-data
Ensure the file is included in the request body correctly
Retry the file upload to Xano
agent_instruction: Set the content type to multi-part/form-data for the file upload request to Xano.
